title: Ubiquiti Rocket5 AC Lite, outdoor, 5GHz AC, 2x RSMA, AirMAX AC
description: Rocket R5AC-Lite is a base station of the Rocket R5AC series, which achieves very high transmission speeds and a stable connection even in a noisy environment. The unit is compatible only with other airMAX AC products and is designed for outdoor use. Thanks to the possible setting of the channel width 20/40/50/60 and 80MHz , real throughput of up to 450Mbps+ can be achieved when using 256QAM As of airOS version 7.1, this unit supports both PtP and PtMP use A novelty in all products with the airMAX ac protocol is the new airOS 7 operating system . This system plots the constellation diagram and the SNR value in real time Device PoE power adapter Power cord Metal ring
